sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99024" key="sunagneu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναγνεύω</orth>, <sense id="n99024.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be pure</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chaste together</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
